{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211254399FDB64FB95FDA51A1EFE"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7590105697095205656","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"进一步了解历史"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767218333,"group_id":"7583734705359424537","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4JnMkFWd4ciORkdLDjNopg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f8f64dad28b64357a23715d9f156f725~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618201&x-signature=9gIm%2FNbXd5dJ%2B0WVAdPTHp75f4Y%3D","user_id":"99619753720","user_name":"虎羊兄妹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"99619753720","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7583734705359424537","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一部聚焦晚清悲情帝王光绪的历史小说，以细腻笔触勾勒出爱新觉罗·载湉从懵懂入宫的孩童，到力图革新的君主，再到困守瀛台的囚徒，最终在壮志未酬中落幕的传奇一生。
晚清末年，山河破碎，风雨飘摇。光绪自六岁登基，便深陷慈禧的权力掌控之下，漫长的傀儡生涯中，他始终怀揣强国梦想。亲政后，他力排众议推行戊戌变法，试图以改革挽救沉沦的大清，却在守旧势力的反扑下惨遭失败，沦为瀛台的阶下囚。此后十余载，他在孤独与压抑中坚守初心，关注时局变迁，见证日俄战争的耻辱、新政的起伏与宪政的微光，即便身体日渐衰败，仍未放弃对国家未来的牵挂。
小说不仅还原了光绪与慈禧的权力博弈、与珍妃的深情羁绊、与维新派的理想共鸣，更深入刻画了他在历史洪流中的挣扎与无奈。从戊戌风雷的激荡到瀛台囚梦的孤寂，从落日余晖的坚守到最终的悲剧落幕。
这不是一部简单的帝王传记，更是一幅晚清社会的众生相。它探讨了权力与理想的碰撞、改革与现实的矛盾，展现了一位帝王在时代局限中的艰难求索。光绪的一生，是个人的悲剧，更是一个王朝的缩影，他未竟的改革理想，终将成为照亮近代中国救亡图存之路的微光，引发后人无尽的感慨与思考。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/25fd49d530da10ef5e6d35fe1799e375","author":"吉祥如意北京","author_id":"","book_id":"7583734705359424537","book_name":"光绪皇帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0b870","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1003人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7585378852973576766","read_count":"1003","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"363884"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"167","tags":"历史古代,历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2of6157645cd61dcf27b8e07a1f1cae99c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779252879&x-signature=2Sfj%2BTHYU9ZyWj71n0n5Sq8ZNN4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108952275312","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"74"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211254399FDB64FB95FDA51A1EFE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":17657,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":35072,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":290},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7600240904482816830","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书好看收获多多"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769572374,"group_id":"758373470
